nasb.text: They wandered, blind, in the streets; They were defiled with blood So that no one could touch their garments.

esv.text: They wandered, blind, through the streets; they were so defiled with blood that no one was able to touch their garments.

cnv.text: 所以，他們像瞎子在街上流蕩，他們被血玷污， 沒有人可以觸摸他們的衣服。

ccb.text: 他们如盲人在街上游荡， 沾满血污， 无人敢碰他们的衣服。
